# espeak-ng (vendored)

`espeak-ng.js` / `espeak-ng.wasm` are a WebAssembly build of
[eSpeak NG](https://github.com/espeak-ng/espeak-ng), the speech synthesizer,
used here for grapheme-to-phoneme (IPA) conversion.

**License: GNU General Public License v3.0 or later (GPL-3.0-or-later).**

Because this project distributes espeak-ng, the project as a whole is licensed
under the GPL-3.0 (see the top-level LICENSE). Source for eSpeak NG is available
at <https://github.com/espeak-ng/espeak-ng>.
